Document:
# Trading System
OpenEdge 14 features a dynamic economy where players can buy and sell items through trading platforms.
## Trading Platforms
Trading platforms are special structures that allow players to conduct commerce. Different platforms offer different services.
## How to Use
### Buying
Interact with a trading platform to view available positions or services. Pay with coins to unlock: - [bold]Service positions[/bold] — unlock special NPC services - [bold]Items[/bold] — direct purchases
The price is calculated based on the item's base value plus platform markup.
### Selling
Place items on a [bold]selling platform[/bold]. The platform evaluates each item's value and calculates your balance.
[bold]Rules:[/bold] - Only OE14 items can be sold (no vanilla items) - Coins cannot be sold (prevents exploitation) - Living things (mobs) cannot be sold - Containers cannot be sold
## Dynamic Pricing
Item prices are calculated automatically based on: - [bold]Base item value[/bold] — inherent worth of the item - [bold]Platform markup[/bold] — percentage added to transaction - [bold]Supply and demand[/bold] — may vary by location
## Reputation
Trading builds reputation with factions. Higher reputation: - Unlocks better trading positions - May provide discounts - Enables special requests
## Tips
- [bold]Compare prices[/bold] between platforms - [bold]Sell in bulk[/bold] — some platforms offer better rates - [bold]Build reputation[/bold] — unlocks more options - [bold]Watch for demand[/bold] — certain items may be worth more
## Related Systems
- [textlink="Economy" link="OE14Economy"] — overall economic system - [textlink="Crafting" link="OE14Crafting"] — create items to sell
